creator: admin-freebsd-bugzilla@927589452.de
text:
error log says "Unable to determine number of pages"

Upstream : https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/ bugreport.cgi?bug=926787
and      : https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=926576

cups-filter does not support ghostscript9 9.27


this is fixed in cups-filter https://www.freshports.org/print/cups-filters version 1.22.5

which is not yet in the prebuild packages

probably should have been found here (?) 

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=237390
